# AI-powered resume review and job matching

## Description

Integrate AI capabilities to help users optimize their resumes and match them against job descriptions.

## Suggested Features

- Upload and store resumes per application
- AI review of resume content (clarity, keywords, formatting suggestions)
- Match score between resume and a pasted job description
- Keyword gap analysis — highlight missing skills or terms
- Support for local/self-hosted models (e.g. Ollama) to keep data private

## Motivation

Tailoring resumes to each job posting is tedious but critical. AI assistance can surface actionable improvements and help users prioritize which applications to invest more effort into.
